email.subject: Invoice #INV-2024-0892 is incorrect
email.body:
Hi Support,

I received my invoice for this month and the amount charged ($199) does not match what I agreed to when I signed up ($149/month). I need this corrected immediately and a refund issued for the difference. My account number is ACC-48291.

Thanks,
John Smith

email.subject: API rate limit exceeded — production is down
email.body:
URGENT: Our production environment is returning 429 errors from your API starting at 08:45 UTC. We have not changed our request volume. This is causing a complete outage for our end customers. Need immediate assistance.

Error details: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests, Retry-After: 3600
Account: techcorp-enterprise-01

email.subject: You WON a $1000 gift card — claim NOW!!!
email.body:
Congratulations!! You have been selected to receive a $1000 gift card. Click the link below to claim your prize before it expires. This offer is only valid for the next 24 hours!!!

CLAIM NOW: http://totally-legit-prizes.xyz/claim?ref=spam123

Do not reply to this email.

email.subject: Order #ORD-8841 hasn't arrived — it's been 2 weeks
email.body:
Hello,

I placed order #ORD-8841 on March 1st and was told it would arrive within 5-7 business days. It is now March 15th and I still haven't received anything. The tracking page just says 'In Transit' with no updates since March 5th. Can you please check what happened to my package?

Maria

email.subject: Just wondering about your enterprise pricing
email.body:
Hi there,

We're a team of about 50 people and are currently evaluating tools for our workflow. Could you share more details about enterprise pricing and what's included? No rush — just exploring options at this stage.

Thanks,
David Lee
Operations Manager, LeeCo

email.subject: Webhook not firing after recent update
email.body:
Hey support team,

Since yesterday's platform update (v3.2.1), our webhooks for the 'order.completed' event have completely stopped firing. We've verified the endpoint URL and secret are correct. Other webhook types (order.created, payment.received) work fine.

This is impacting our fulfillment pipeline. Task: please investigate asap.

Alice Wong, StartupCo Engineering

email.subject: Double charged on March 10th
email.body:
Hello,

Reviewing my bank statement I noticed I was charged twice on March 10th — two charges of $49.99 each. My subscription should only bill once per month. Please refund the duplicate charge.

Account email: bob.nguyen@bigclient.com

Bob

email.subject: How do I export my data?
email.body:
Hi,

I'd like to export all my data from the platform. Could you point me to the right documentation or let me know how to do this? I couldn't find it in the settings menu.

Thanks,
Sarah

email.subject: Exclusive business opportunity — $50,000/month from home
email.body:
Dear Friend,

I am a Nigerian prince with urgent financial matters. I need your help to transfer $5,000,000 USD out of my country. In return you will receive 30% of the total amount. Please send your bank details to collect your share. God bless you.

Prince Adebayo

email.subject: Wrong item delivered — need return label ASAP
email.body:
Hi,

I ordered a Blue XL hoodie (Item #HW-2021-BLU-XL) but received a Red M instead. I have an event tomorrow where I need to wear this item. Please send a return label immediately and expedite the correct item. This is very urgent.

Order #ORD-9920
Carlos Martinez

thread.subject: Bulk export feature broken — data integrity concern
thread.body:
Hi,

Our data analyst Lisa Park (acmecorp.com) has been trying to use the bulk CSV export on our Pro subscription. When exporting more than 10,000 rows, the file downloads as an empty CSV (0 bytes). We rely on this for our weekly reporting pipeline. This needs to be fixed before Friday.

Product: DataSync Pro
Account: acmecorp-pro-2021

thread.subject: Re: Bulk export feature broken — data integrity concern
thread.body:
Hi Lisa,

Thank you for reaching out. We're looking into this. Could you confirm the exact export parameters you're using (date range, filters applied)?

Best,
Support Team

thread.subject: Re: Bulk export feature broken — data integrity concern
thread.body: Date range: Jan 1–Mar 14, 2024. Filters: status=active, region=all. I tried three times and got empty files every time. The progress bar completes but the file is empty.

label.issue_summary: Bulk CSV export produces empty files when exporting more than 10,000 rows on Pro subscription
label.resolution_needed: Fix bulk export to correctly generate CSV files for large datasets

thread.subject: Can't login — 2FA code not working
thread.body:
Hello,

This is Mike Turner. Since this morning I cannot log into my account. I enter my password correctly but the 2FA code sent to my phone is being rejected as invalid. I've tried 5 times. I have an important client presentation using my files in 2 hours.

Email: mike.turner@freelancer.net

label.issue_summary: Two-factor authentication codes are being rejected, preventing login to account
label.resolution_needed: Restore account access by fixing or bypassing 2FA verification

thread.subject: Enterprise contract renewal — pricing discrepancy
thread.body:
To Whom It May Concern,

Global Retail Inc. is due to renew our enterprise contract (#ENT-GR-2022) next month. Our account manager quoted us $48,000/year for 500 seats, but the renewal invoice shows $62,400. This $14,400 discrepancy needs to be resolved urgently as our finance team needs the signed contract by end of Q1.

Sincerely,
Procurement Department
Global Retail Inc.

thread.subject: Re: Enterprise contract renewal — pricing discrepancy
thread.body:
Dear Procurement Team,

We've escalated this to our enterprise sales team. They'll reach out within 24 hours to resolve the pricing discrepancy.

Regards,
Enterprise Support

label.issue_summary: Enterprise renewal invoice shows $62,400 but account manager quoted $48,000 for 500 seats
label.resolution_needed: Correct invoice to reflect agreed-upon price of $48,000 before end of Q1

thread.subject: HIPAA compliance documentation request
thread.body:
Hi,

We are considering using your platform to store patient-related data. Our compliance officer Jessica Tran needs your HIPAA BAA (Business Associate Agreement) and SOC 2 Type II report before we can proceed with procurement. Please send these documents or let us know where we can access them.

HealthApp Inc.

label.issue_summary: Customer requires HIPAA BAA and SOC 2 Type II documentation to evaluate platform for patient data storage
label.resolution_needed: Provide HIPAA BAA and SOC 2 Type II report to compliance officer

thread.subject: SSO integration failing with Okta
thread.body:
Hey,

We're trying to configure SSO using Okta for our team (fintech-startup.com, Enterprise plan). The SAML assertion is being rejected by your system with error: 'Invalid NameID format'. We've followed your documentation exactly. Our IdP is Okta with NameID format set to EmailAddress.

This is blocking our entire team from accessing the platform.

thread.subject: Re: SSO integration failing with Okta
thread.body:
Hello,

Thank you for the details. Can you share your Okta SAML metadata XML so we can review the configuration?

Thanks,
Technical Support

label.issue_summary: Okta SAML SSO integration failing with Invalid NameID format error, blocking all team access
label.resolution_needed: Fix SAML configuration to accept Okta EmailAddress NameID format

thread.subject: Unacceptable service disruption — demanding SLA credit
thread.body:
To the Support Team,

I am the CTO of Enterprise-Client Inc., a paying Enterprise customer (Contract #ENT-EC-0089, 200 seats, $120,000/year). Your platform was completely unavailable from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM on March 12th — a 4-hour outage during our scheduled batch processing window.

This caused us to miss a critical regulatory reporting deadline, and we may face fines from our regulatory body. Your SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime, which means maximum allowable downtime is 8.7 hours per year. This single incident consumed nearly 50% of our annual allowance.

I am demanding: (1) A full incident report, (2) SLA credit per our contract terms, (3) A written assurance that this will not recur, and (4) A dedicated account review call within 48 hours.

If these are not addressed promptly, we will be exploring alternative vendors.

Robert Chen, CTO
Enterprise-Client Inc.

policy_snippets.title: SLA Credit Policy
policy_snippets.content: Enterprise customers experiencing downtime exceeding 0.1% monthly uptime commitment are eligible for service credits: 1–4 hours: 10% monthly fee credit; 4–8 hours: 25% credit; 8+ hours: 50% credit. Credits are applied to the next billing cycle and must be requested within 30 days of incident.

policy_snippets.title: Incident Response Policy
policy_snippets.content: For Severity-1 incidents (total service unavailability), we publish a detailed post-mortem within 5 business days including: root cause analysis, timeline of events, remediation steps taken, and preventive measures implemented.

policy_snippets.title: Enterprise Escalation Policy
policy_snippets.content: Enterprise customers may request a dedicated account review call with their Account Manager and a Senior Technical Lead. These calls are typically scheduled within 2-3 business days. For critical escalations, same-day or next-day scheduling is available.

thread.subject: Accidentally deleted important project data
thread.body:
Hi support,

I made a terrible mistake. I was cleaning up old projects and accidentally deleted our entire 'Q4 Campaign' project which had months of work. It was deleted about an hour ago. There was no confirmation dialog — it just deleted everything. Is there any way to recover this data? Please, this is critical for our business.

Ana Silva
Small Business Owner

policy_snippets.title: Data Recovery Policy
policy_snippets.content: Pro and Enterprise customers benefit from daily automated backups with 30-day retention. Deleted projects can be restored from backup upon request. Recovery requests made within 24 hours of deletion have a 95%+ success rate. Requests should include the project name, approximate deletion time, and account email.

policy_snippets.title: Restore Process
policy_snippets.content: Data restores typically take 1-4 hours depending on project size. The support team initiates the restore from the backup system. Customers are notified via email when the restore is complete. Note: any data created/edited in the project after the last backup snapshot will not be recovered.

must_not_include: say data is permanently lost without checking

thread.subject: Charged after cancellation confirmation — 3 months of charges
thread.body:
Hello,

We cancelled our subscription on December 31, 2023 and received a cancellation confirmation email. Despite this, we have been charged for January ($299), February ($299), and March ($299) — a total of $897 in unauthorized charges.

I have attached the cancellation confirmation email. This is unacceptable and constitutes unauthorized billing. We are requesting an immediate refund of $897 and written confirmation that our account is closed.

MedGroup Billing Department

policy_snippets.title: Refund Policy
policy_snippets.content: If a customer was charged after a valid cancellation, a full refund for all post-cancellation charges will be processed within 5-10 business days. Support agents should verify the cancellation date using the account management system and cross-reference with billing records before processing.

policy_snippets.title: Cancellation Verification
policy_snippets.content: Customers should be requested to provide their cancellation confirmation email/ticket number. Support agents can verify in the system using the customer's account email or ID. Once verified, escalate to billing team with REFUND_VERIFIED tag for processing.

must_not_include: question the validity of the cancellation without evidence
ask them to wait without a clear timeline
